24472.title: Fareed Zakaria GPS
24472.description: Fareed Zakaria GPS takes a comprehensive look at foreign affairs and the policies shaping our world.

24473.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
24473.description: Stanley Tucci explores his former home, Tuscany, with a wine bar crawl, celebrating the importance of the lowly loaf and samples dishes which use stale bread as the key ingredient.

24474.title: African Voices Changemakers
24474.description: A Kenyan producer is on a mission to make the superhero genre more inclusive; the visionary behind the South Africa's first superhero comic book series.

24475.title: Marketplace Africa
24475.description: A look at the contemporary African art market; given the wide range of applications, satellites are part of the solution when it comes to solving the connectivity gap in Africa.

24476.title: Marketplace Africa
24476.description: Kenya's apparel sector localizes its supply chain and the role of Kenya-based textile manufacturers; African designers looking for success internationally face unique hurdles.

24477.title: Connecting Africa
24477.description: From the CEO of a massive energy company in South Africa and fruit exporters in Egypt to the man who bought a bank in Nigeria, we look at all aspects of doing business in Africa.

24478.title: Inside Africa
24478.description: From superbikes to racecars, some of South Africa's fastest men and women on wheels provide an inside look at what life is like on, and off, the track.

24479.title: CNN Newsroom with Michael Holmes
24479.description: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

24480.title: World Sport

24495.description: Christiane Amanpour provides her powerful interview skills and provocative analysis on global stories that matter to you.

24496.description: Hala Gorani breaks down the day's news, curating the stories that matter and getting into exactly why they are important.

24497.description: Richard Quest presides over a cast of experts and correspondents to deliver unrivaled facts, figures and analysis from the business world, a nightly wealth check.
